The '''Sith escort gunship''' was an attack craft employed by the [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]]. It served as the primary warship of the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Navy/Legends|naval]] forces.

==Characteristics==
The Sith escort gunship was designed for speed and agility in combat, contrasting the larger, slower [[Derriphan-class battleship|''Derriphan''-class battleships]] of the era. This gunship was 75 meters long and was armed with six [[autoblaster]]s, and was capable of carrying 30 troops into battle, plus up to 250 metric tons of cargo. The gunship required a dedicated crew of eighteen Sith warriors.

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith'' 2]] {{1st}}
